text.title: Claude Code Headless Default Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure for emitting a CLI-vs-SDK decision record.

step.name: walk-decision-tree
step.action: Walk content/06-decision-tree.xml; land on chosen_runtime + optional switch_trigger.

step.name: compose-invocation-argv
step.action: For claude-code-headless: build canonical argv `claude -p "{brief}" --allowedTools=X,Y --max-turns=15 --output-format stream-json --verbose`. For SDK: skip argv.

step.name: emit-decision-record
step.action: Compose record per content/02-output-contract.xml; include switch_trigger when chosen_runtime=agent-sdk.

step.name: validate-and-route
step.action: Run scripts/validate-output.py; route to eng owner.
